name_en: 🆕【Top Quality】M12823 Green Passport👏👏A 'Cuirette Passport NM' decorated with a single-cell Maccasse canvas to create an exquisite atmosphere. Features the unique design charm of the 'Louis Vuitton Color Mania' series with colored leather trim and lining. Dimensions: 10 x 14 x 2.5 cm.🎁
